assertions.evidence: No pillar-cluster architecture. Content organized as flat monthly lists. Pillar concept mentioned briefly in 'Estructura del blog' as 'categorías del blog' (not pillar architecture). Topic clusters mentioned late in Mes 3 as categories, not as a top-level strategy.
Uses 'intención informacional / comparativa / transaccional' clusters but no TOFU/MOFU/BOFU labels with distribution percentages. No explicit funnel distribution strategy.
Tables with '# | Título | Keyword principal | Tipo | CTA' for each month (3 tables × 8 articles). Column structure present though missing 'Canal' column.
'Resumen ejecutivo: qué hacer esta semana' at the end has 5 action items but no 'quick wins' framing with expected results in less than 30 days.

KPIs defined: 'Tráfico orgánico: Mes 1: 200-500 visitas/mes', 'Leads captados: 200-500 suscriptores', 'Posicionamiento: 5-10 keywords en posición 10-30', 'Registros en la SaaS: 20-50'. Specific and measurable.
